project_name: SIGIP - Sistema de Gestión de Direcciones IP
theme: Enterprise Admin ERP (Light and Dark Mode)
design_archetype: The Swiss Brutalist meets Performance Pro

headings.usage: Dashboard metrics, page titles, modal headers. Avoid generic sans-serifs.

body.usage: General UI text, table content, forms, descriptions.

monospace.usage: IP Addresses, MAC Addresses, Subnets, CIDR blocks, Logs.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimalist approach. Use subtle, layered drop-shadows only on hover states or floating elements like modals/dropdowns. Avoid muddy shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: Crisp 1px borders (border-border/50) to delineate table rows, cards, and sections. High-tech/enterprise feel.
visual_enhancers.radii: Subtle roundness. Max 8px (rounded-md to rounded-lg). Nested elements must have concentric radii.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use ONLY for sticky headers or dropdowns. Requires backdrop-blur-xl and a subtle 1px border for definition.

components.sidebar: Collapsible sidebar with smooth width transition. Uses Lucide or Phosphor icons. Active state highlighted with primary color left-border (2px) and light background tint.
components.navbar: Top navbar containing Breadcrumbs on the left, and Global Search, Theme Toggle, User Profile on the right.
components.tables: High-density enterprise tables. Sticky headers, alternating row colors or 1px bottom borders. IP addresses MUST use monospace font. Include a top action bar (Search, Filter, Export PDF/Excel, Add New).
components.cards: Metric cards (Total IPs, Segments, etc.) should use 'Grid Borders' style or flat solid surfaces with sharp 1px borders. No heavy shadows.
components.buttons: Rectangular with subtle 4px-8px radius. Clear active/hover states.
components.modals: Used for CRUD operations. Backdrop must be black/50 with backdrop-blur-sm. Solid surfaces inside.
components.charts: Recharts. Pie charts for IP availability (Available vs Occupied vs Reserved). Bar charts for Segment usage. Ensure charts are responsive and use the status color palette.

layouts.dashboard_grid: Mode B: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-4 or Gap-6. Metric cards take col-span-1. Charts take col-span-2.
layouts.page_structure: h-screen flex layout. Sidebar on left (fixed or flex). Main content area on right with flex-col (Navbar top, scrollable content area below, padding p-6 or p-8).

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states on all buttons and table rows (e.g., hover:bg-slate-50/10).
motion.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in for page loads. 0.2s ease.
motion.sidebar_toggle: Smooth width transition using standard CSS transition (transition-width duration-300).
motion.charts: Animate charts on mount using Recharts default animations.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Especially status badges (use light backgrounds with dark text in light mode, e.g., bg-green-100 text-green-800).
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, filters, table rows) MUST include 'data-testid' (e.g., data-testid='login-submit', data-testid='segment-row-1').

image_urls.instructions: Use as a full-cover background image on the login screen with a heavy dark overlay (e.g., bg-black/60) to ensure the login form and institutional logo stand out.

image_urls.description: Abstract blue tech network data center
image_urls.instructions: Use as a fallback pattern or for specific network-related banners/modals if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: 'npm install recharts lucide-react sonner clsx tailwind-merge'.
Set up standard Shadcn components for Buttons, Inputs, Tables, Dialogs, Selects, and Dropdowns.
Do NOT use raw HTML elements for advanced components like Select or Dialogs; use customized Shadcn/Radix components to guarantee accessibility and consistent styling.
For the IP layout, ALWAYS use monospace font (IBM Plex Mono) when rendering IP addresses, subnets, or MAC addresses to maintain tabular alignment and readability.
Ensure the Dashboard uses Recharts to accurately display the specified charts (Pie chart for overall IPs, Bar chart for segment usage).
Implement a robust 'data-testid' strategy across the entire application to aid in automated end-to-end testing.
Construct a completely responsive collapsible sidebar (mobile-first approach, hamburger on mobile, expanded/collapsed toggle on desktop).
Theme support (Light/Dark) must be handled gracefully across all components. Ensure table borders and alternating rows remain visible in dark mode.
Generate dummy data based on 'Hospital Militar' context (e.g., Segments like 'Cardiology', 'Pediatrics', 'Administration', standard /24 subnets 192.168.1.x).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic, 'AI slop' aesthetics. Do not center everything. Create a professional, enterprise-grade density.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) only where it makes structural sense (navbars, sticky headers).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Always add transitions for specific interactive properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, i.e., do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the CSS file. This disrupts human reading flow.
Always use modern button styles (subtle rounded corners, clear interactions) relevant to a professional ERP.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡) for icons. Use Phosphor or Lucide icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, selection states.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable, except in data tables where dense spacing is preferred.
Do not use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use the curated image URLs provided.
Use `sonner` for toast notifications (alerts, success messages like 'IP Asignada').
